summary: Gate P reviewed the API provider preflight evidence and passed. Provider request/evidence schemas exist, provider and credential source remain pending human selection, no secret value is stored, hard cost ceilings are recorded, and no network or paid provider call occurred.
recommendation_for_human: Next task is the single paid provider smoke approval proposal. A real API call still requires explicit human selection of provider, credential source, model policy, max budget, and expiry.
notes: No paid provider call is authorized yet.
Human approval is now the next boundary before any real API call.
